body.title: Inference proxy: prefer flat-rate subscription sources over usage-based
body.result: billing_type on Source; OllamaCloudSource (flat_rate, OLLAMA_PRO_API_KEY-gated); flat-rate routing preference in RulesEngine; ollama-pro model entries; OR tools forwarding fix (incidental); 17 tests; e543554d
body.description:
Usage-based accounts (OR, Anthropic API) will eventually end or become cost-prohibitive. Flat-rate subscription providers ($20/mo Ollama Pro, CC $20/mo plan) should be preferred for DickSimnel work when capacity is available.

Update T-inference-provider-priority (already sprint) to include: (1) a `billing_type: flat_rate | usage_based` field on provider config; (2) routing priority: flat-rate before usage-based within the same capability tier; (3) Ollama Pro (ollama.com hosted API, $20/mo) as a provider entry with flat_rate billing. The inference proxy picks the cheapest flat-rate source first, falls back to usage-based only when needed.

This ticket extends T-inference-provider-priority — coordinate or merge if that ticket is actively being sprinted.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/device.py, config/profiles/ (provider config), devices/inference/models_registry.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; OOP-first
**Scope boundary:** billing_type field + routing preference + Ollama Pro as provider; does not change caching (T-inference-caching-all-providers) or DickSimnel protocol (T-dsimnel-cc-parity)
**Completion criteria:** Inference proxy routes DickSimnel requests to Ollama Pro when available and flat-rate is preferred; falls back to OR when Ollama Pro quota exhausted. Config-driven — no hard-coded routing.
